Alko Oy Keskusvarasto.reason: Major national distributor with strong creditworthiness; 168 days overdue suggests process/dispute issue, not inability to pay.

Kesko Oyj Päivittäistavarakauppa.reason: Large retailer chain; 6-day overdue is administrative lag typical for corporates; tighten to 40 from baseline ~50.

My Dear Beer B.V..reason: Export customer; 52 days overdue aligns with stated 6-8 week export DSO; monitor for slippage beyond 56 days.

OlutSatama (Ideaosuuskunta Aito).reason: 275 days overdue signals chronic payment difficulty; reduce DSO and require prepayment or COD for future orders.

Salama Shop.reason: Own channel; two invoices 65+ days overdue is anomalous—internal settlement issue, not credit; enforce daily reconciliation.

alerts.message: Two invoices (€1,150 from 2020-05-07 and €1,301 from 2026-02-01) total €2,451 overdue across own channels. Audit internal P&L allocation and receivables posting immediately; own channels must clear within 5 days.

€18,484 due 2025-10-30 is 162 days overdue. Escalate to credit manager: contact decision-maker, investigate dispute/payment hold, propose settlement plan or escalate to collections. This is 26% of total overdue AR.
€5,882 due 2025-07-05 is 279 days overdue. Likely uncollectible; write-off or place on credit hold immediately. Do not ship new orders until settled.
€4,540 due 2024-08-14 is 573 days overdue. Classify as doubtful debt; initiate formal collection or write-off process. Verify customer still operating.
€9,558 due 2026-02-16 is 52 days overdue (within 6-8 week export window but approaching ceiling). Contact today to confirm payment date; if beyond 56 days, hold next shipment pending payment.

Cash risk this week: €62,781 fixed costs due (€47,425 payroll + €15,356 OP loan) against only €39,041 last-30-day revenue. Accelerate collections on €70,111 overdue AR; prioritize Alko (€18,484) and Kesko (€3,296) calls today.
44 open POs (€79,996) create future payables pressure. Cross-reference with 113 stock lines; confirm no excess inventory build ahead of Bemböle contract wind-down (Sept 2026).

insights.weekly_cash_risk: Fixed costs (€62.8K) exceed last-30-day sales (€39K) by 61%; if overdue AR does not convert this week, liquidity stress on payroll and loan service by mid-April.
insights.top_action: Call Alko Oy (€18,484, 162 days overdue) and Kesko Oyj (€3,296, 6 days overdue) credit managers within 2 hours to confirm payment status and obtain commitment date; simultaneously audit Salama Shop internal invoices for posting errors and recover €2,451 by EOD.
pattern_insights: Two 'zombie' invoices (#3 and #9, totaling €2,147, dated 2020) suggest broken collections process for own channels; establish weekly internal settlement SOP to prevent recurrence.

Export customers (My Dear Beer, OlutSatama) show 50-280 day overdue spread, indicating either DSO misalignment or customer viability issue; segment export AR by payment timeliness and apply prepayment for >60-day histories.
insights.wc_note: 62% YoY growth with 6-8 week export DSO creates structural working capital deficit; August peak (€282K) arrives October, but fixed €62.8K monthly burn means April–July requires €251K+ liquidity buffer—currently at risk without accelerated collections.
